codegenInoperableDeclarations.reason: Official expression id contains whitespace and libGD parses it as an object variable instead of a callable expression.

parameters.extra: Generally, it is recommended to keep sharing of IP addressed enabled to make connections faster and more often possible. Disabling IP address sharing will force all connections to pass messages through a TURN relay server, you can make P2P use one by adding one as an ICE candidate.
